settings.title: Settings
settings.language.label: Interface language
settings.language.desc: Choose the display language for the app
settings.shortcuts.hotkeyDesc: Press to start/stop recording and transcribe
settings.shortcuts.captureHint: Use at least one modifier ({modifiers}) + a key
settings.shortcuts.editHotkeyDesc: Select text, press this shortcut, speak an editing instruction
settings.shortcuts.editRequiresPolish: Requires AI polishing to be enabled
settings.mic.noMicDesc: Connect a microphone or check system settings
settings.stt.modeDesc: Choose local or cloud transcription engine
settings.stt.languageDesc: Hints the model to prioritize this language; actual output may vary
settings.stt.vadDesc: Filter out background noise before transcription
settings.stt.localEngineDescQwen3Asr: 30 languages, 22 Chinese dialects. Better on accented & noisy audio.
sttModel.largeV3Turbo.name: Whisper Turbo
sttModel.largeV3TurboQ5.name: Whisper Turbo Lite
sttModel.base.name: Whisper Base
sttModel.largeV3TurboZhTw.name: Whisper Turbo TW
sttModel.qwen3Asr17B.name: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B
sttModel.qwen3Asr17B.desc: Highest accuracy, BF16. 30 languages + 22 Chinese dialects
sttModel.qwen3Asr06B.name: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B
sttModel.qwen3Asr06B.desc: Lighter & faster, slightly lower accuracy than 1.7B
setup.sttModelChoiceDesc: Select a model based on your needs. You can change this later in Settings.
polishModel.phi4Mini.name: Phi 4 Mini
polishModel.ministral3b.name: Ministral 3B
polishModel.ministral14b.name: Ministral 14B
polishModel.qwen34b.name: Qwen 3 4B
polishModel.qwen38b.name: Qwen 3 8B
model.compat.tight: Runs but memory will be tight
model.compat.bad: Not enough memory for this model
settings.polish.reasoningDesc: Allow the model to think step-by-step before responding (slower)
settings.polish.noRules: No rules yet. Add a rule to customize prompts per app or website.
settings.polish.rulePromptPlaceholder: e.g. Format as email with greeting and sign-off. Use professional tone.
settings.polish.rulePromptHint: These instructions are appended to the base prompt when this rule matches.
promptRules.title: App Profiles
promptRules.desc: Automatically adjust transcription output style based on the app you're using.
promptRules.voiceTipMain: Press {hotkey} to describe your rule by voice.
promptRules.voiceTipExample: e.g. “I want to add a rule for LINE — use a casual, friendly tone with emoji.”
promptRules.voiceRecHint: Speak now — press {hotkey} again to finish.
promptRules.polishDisabled: App profiles require AI Polishing to be enabled.
promptRules.basePromptDesc: Universal STT processing rules, automatically applied to all transcriptions
promptRules.resetDefaultsMessage: This will replace all app profiles with the built-in defaults. Any custom profiles will be lost.
promptRules.altMatchHint: Rule triggers if any condition matches (e.g. native app OR browser URL).
setup.dataRootDesc: Models and data can take 6–7 GB. Redirect to an external drive if needed.
settings.storage.dataRootDesc: Where models, history, and audio are stored.
settings.storage.migrate.title: Move Data to New Location?
settings.storage.migrate.moveDesc: Copy files to the new folder, then delete originals.
settings.storage.migrate.changeOnlyDesc: Update the path without moving files.
settings.storage.migrate.noSpace: Not enough free space at the selected location.
settings.storage.migrate.alreadyHasData: Target folder already contains Sumi data. Files may be overwritten.
settings.storage.progress.title: Moving Data…
settings.storage.progress.desc: Do not eject or disconnect the target drive.
settings.storage.err.meeting: Cannot change storage while meeting mode is active.
settings.danger.resetDesc: Restore all settings to their original values
settings.danger.rerunSetupDesc: Show the first-launch setup overlay again
confirm.resetMessage: This will restore all settings to their original values. This cannot be undone.
dictionary.title: Custom Dictionary
dictionary.desc: Add proper nouns, names, or domain-specific terms. The AI will automatically use the correct form when it encounters similar-sounding words.
dictionary.toggleDesc: Inject dictionary terms into the AI polishing prompt
dictionary.emptyHint: Add terms to help the AI recognize proper nouns and names.
history.title: History
history.privacyNote: Your data stays private — all history is stored locally on this device only.
history.retentionDesc: How long to keep history entries
history.storageLocDesc: Where history and audio files are saved
history.clearAllDesc: Permanently delete all history entries and audio files
history.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all history and audio files? This action cannot be undone.
about.title: About
about.desc: Your voice, in writing. AI-powered speech-to-text — press a hotkey to record, transcribe, and paste at your cursor.
about.gatekeeperNote: After restarting, macOS may ask you to allow the app again in System Settings › Privacy & Security.
setup.permissionsDesc: Sumi needs these permissions to record audio and paste text at your cursor.
setup.permAccDesc: Paste text at your cursor with {pasteShortcut}
setup.completeDesc: Speech recognition model downloaded. Preparing to load...
setup.activatingDesc: Warming up the speech recognition model. This may take a moment.
setup.llmActivatingDesc: Warming up the AI polish model. This may take a moment.
setup.llmPromptDesc: AI Polishing uses a local LLM (~4.6 GB) to refine your transcriptions — fixing grammar, removing fillers, and improving clarity. Fully offline.
setup.polishLocalDesc: Choose a model. Runs fully offline — your data never leaves this device.
setup.polishCloudDesc: Faster, but text is sent to an external server. Requires an API key.
setup.sttChoiceDesc: Choose how Sumi transcribes your voice.
setup.sttLocalDesc: Choose a model. Runs fully offline — your audio never leaves this device.
setup.sttCloudDesc: Faster, less resource-intensive. Audio is sent to an external server.
test.step1.title: Test your microphone
test.step1.subtitle: Speak normally to see if it’s working.
test.step1.question: Do you see the blue bars moving?
test.step2.title: Test your hotkey
test.step2.subtitle: Press {hotkey} to verify it works.
test.step2.question: Do the keys turn blue when pressed?
test.step3.title: General dictation
test.step3.instruction: Click the text area, press {hotkey} to start, speak, then press {hotkey} again to stop
test.step3.sampleText: Remind me to buy milk and eggs on the way home today.
test.step4.title: Try it in Gmail!
test.step4.instruction: Click the email body, press {hotkey} to start, speak, then press {hotkey} again to stop
test.step4.sampleText: Try saying: “Hi Alice, are we still on for lunch tomorrow? Alan”
test.step5.title: AI Polishing
test.step5.subtitle: Edit by Voice uses AI to apply your spoken instructions to selected text.
test.step5.polishNotReady: AI polishing is not configured yet. Enable it in Settings to use Edit by Voice.
test.step5.polishReady: AI polishing is configured. You can now test Edit by Voice.
test.step6.title: Edit by Voice
test.step6.instruction: Select all text, press {hotkey} to start, speak your editing instruction, then press {hotkey} again to apply
test.step6.sampleText: Try saying: “Translate to English” or “Make it more formal”
test.step6.prefill: Hi Alice, are we still on for lunch tomorrow? Let me know if that works for you. Thanks, Alan
stats.heroSubtitleAfter: to dictate, press again to paste.
stats.emptyHint: Start dictating to see your statistics here
settings.behavior.autoPasteDesc: Automatically paste transcription at cursor position
settings.behavior.micIdleDesc: Close mic after idle to prevent audio ducking
settings.behavior.recordMeetingAudioDesc: Meeting recordings can run for hours. Stored separately from regular recordings.
meeting.deleteAudioConfirm: This will permanently delete the audio recording. The transcript and summary will be kept.
stats.fact.novelProgress: {percent}% of a novel, written by voice!
stats.fact.keepGoing: Keep dictating to unlock fun stats!
meeting.emptyHint: Start a meeting recording to see your notes here
meeting.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this meeting note?
meeting.deleteAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all meeting notes? This cannot be undone.
meeting.noSummaryYet: No summary yet. Click the sparkle button to generate one.
meeting.polishNotReady: AI polishing is not configured. Set it up in Settings first.
model.deleteConfirm: Delete {name}? This will free {size} of disk space.
model.deleteActiveWarning: This model is currently active and will be unloaded.
